title: Log Stripping + Undo
description: Easy log-stripping via stonecutter recipes & "undo" options to take them back to logs.
body:
Easy Log Stripping on the Stonecutter

Strip all Logs, Wood, Stems, Hyphae, & Bamboo Blocks on the Stonecutter to save time!
Also includes "undo" options:
Accidentally strip too much or need to simplify your inventory storage - convert the stripped blocks back to their original versions.
